## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change
- [ ] 📚 Documentation only
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] 🧪 Tests / tooling only

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`), **or** this change is
      docs/tooling only and does not need one.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I updated the documentation where appropriate.
- [ ] `pnpm run ci` passes locally.
